title: Jack's New Camera
excerpt: Jack was so excited to get this personalized Bannor Toys camera. He chews on it occasionally (the teething process is taking a long time!), waves it around proudly and bangs it down. Basically all the things he wants to do…
body: Jack was so excited to get this personalized Bannor Toys camera. He chews on it occasionally (the teething process is taking a long time!), waves it around proudly and bangs it down. Basically all the things he wants to do with my real camera (iPhone) he can do with this. Pretty sure this is his way of saying thanks Allison for such a thoughtful gift!
